news_items.headline: S&P 500 positive earnings guidance at highest levels since 2015 - 62 out of 109 companies issued positive EPS guidance for Q2 2026
news_items.data_pt: 109 companies issued EPS guidance for Q2 2026; 62 positive, 47 negative. 62 above 5-yr avg of 44, 10-yr avg of 41

news_items.headline: S&P 500 Q2 2026 earnings estimates revised upward by 2.7% since March 31
news_items.data_pt: Analyst estimates for Q2 2026 per-share earnings increased 2.7% since March 31, 2026

news_items.headline: Tech sector earnings growth projections for 2026: 15%+ growth expected; mega-cap 'Magnificent Seven' posted 37% growth in 2024 vs 7% for rest of index
news_items.data_pt: S&P 500 2026 earnings projected 15%+ growth per LSEG Head Tajinder Dhillon. Magnificent Seven (NVDA, AAPL, AMZN et al) had 37% earnings growth 2024 vs 7% rest of index

news_items.headline: Broadcom weak AI chip outlook in early June sparked semiconductor selloff; Intel, AMD, Micron impacted
news_items.data_pt: Broadcom earnings reported June 4, 2026 with weaker-than-expected AI chip outlook, triggering broader chip sector decline

news_items.headline: Foreign investor reversal after 24-day selling streak: June 12 saw 2.12 trillion won net purchases after 75.6 trillion won cumulative outflow
news_items.data_pt: June 12, 2026: Foreigners snapped 24-day selling streak with 2.12 trillion won net purchases ($1.4 billion) after 75.6 trillion won cumulative outflow

news_items.headline: US-Iran peace deal reduces war risk premium on crude oil; Trump declared 'full reopening of Hormuz'
news_items.data_pt: June 15, 2026: US-Iran 106-day conflict effectively ended per market sentiment. Trump announced 'full reopening' of Strait of Hormuz

news_items.headline: Federal Reserve holding rates steady at 3.50%-3.75% at June 16-17 meeting with 99% market probability
news_items.data_pt: Fed funds rate steady at 3.50%-3.75%. June 16-17 FOMC meeting expected 0 bps change per 99% market probability

news_items.headline: Oil demand forecast downward: Global oil demand now expected to fall 1.1 million barrels/day in 2026 vs prior projection of 0.2 million b/d growth
news_items.data_pt: June 2026 EIA STEO: Global oil demand forecast revised down to -1.1 million b/d decline vs prior +0.2 million b/d growth due to Middle East closure impact

news_items.headline: TSMC CEO warns chip supply will fall short of AI-fueled demand for years; production capacity remains bottleneck
news_items.data_pt: June 4, 2026: TSMC CEO C.C. Wei stated global chip supply won't meet AI demand for years; US capacity expansion insufficient

news_items.headline: Global interposer market projected to grow from $1.43B (2025) to $4.12B (2035) at 11.2% CAGR due to AI/HPC demand
news_items.data_pt: Global Interposer market: $1.43B (2025) → $4.12B (2035) at 11.2% CAGR, driven by AI/HPC/5G infrastructure demand
